title: Asuka pic on newtype
wikitext:
[]: Asuka pic on newtype?             Quote Post by Skywalker007 » Sat Jan 31, 2009 8:54 pm Hi guys, I just stumble on this on the internet. It seem to be an Asuka pic from Newtype magazine(not sure about this though). I am not sure that you guys have already seen this or not. So, I get the link to you. http://daitrombe.net/image/show/17569

[]:             Quote Post by Oedipusfoot » Sat Jan 31, 2009 9:14 pm One thing I'm glad about concerning Newtype is that those spreads don't necessarily reflect what the characters will look like in the films.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat Jan 31, 2009 9:48 pm This was discussed (including more NewType scans) back in November here: http://www.evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?p=204085#204085

[]:             Quote Post by Skywalker007 » Sun Feb 01, 2009 10:29 pm Oh! thank you.
